original_query:
PREFIX dcat: <http://www.w3.org/ns/dcat#>
PREFIX dct: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/>
PREFIX dcat2: <http://www.w3.org/ns/dcat#>

SELECT ?endpointType (COUNT(DISTINCT ?service) AS ?numServices)
WHERE {
  ?service a dcat:DataService .
  ?service dcat:endpointURL ?endpointURL .
  BIND(
    IF(CONTAINS(STR(?endpointURL), "/wms"), "WMS",
    IF(CONTAINS(STR(?endpointURL), "/wfs"), "WFS",
    IF(CONTAINS(STR(?endpointURL), "/wcs"), "WCS",
    IF(CONTAINS(STR(?endpointURL), "sparql"), "SPARQL",
    IF(CONTAINS(STR(?endpointURL), "/api"), "REST API",
    "Altro"))))) AS ?endpointType)
}
GROUP BY ?endpointType
ORDER BY DESC(?numServices)

original_query:
PREFIX dcatap: <http://data.europa.eu/r5r/>
PREFIX dcat: <http://www.w3.org/ns/dcat#>
PREFIX dct: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/>
PREFIX skos: <http://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/core#>
PREFIX foaf: <http://xmlns.com/foaf/0.1/>

SELECT ?countryLabel (COUNT(DISTINCT ?dataset) AS ?count)
WHERE {
  ?catalogue a dcat:Catalog ;
             dct:spatial ?country ;
             dcat:dataset ?dataset .
  ?country skos:prefLabel ?countryLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?countryLabel) = "en")
  ?dataset dcatap:applicableLegislation <http://data.europa.eu/eli/reg_impl/2023/138/oj> ;
           dcatap:hvdCategory <http://data.europa.eu/bna/c_a9135398> .
}
GROUP BY ?countryLabel
ORDER BY DESC(?count)

SELECT ?publisher (COUNT(DISTINCT ?dataset) AS ?hvd_count)

original_query:
PREFIX dct: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/>
PREFIX dcat: <http://www.w3.org/ns/dcat#>

SELECT ?dataset ?title ?issued ?modified WHERE {
  ?dataset a dcat:Dataset .
  ?dataset dct:title ?title .
  FILTER(
    CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?title)), "rapporti di lavoro attivati") && CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?title)), "tabella 01") ||
    CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?title)), "brevetti enea") ||
    CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?title)), "pdnd") && CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?title)), "aderenti") ||
    CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?title)), "progetti") && CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?title)), "restart") ||
    CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?title)), "pee_edifici") ||
    CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?title)), "open source") && CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?title)), "pubblica amministrazione") ||
    CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?title)), "stradario") && CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?title)), "caldiero") ||
    CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?title)), "parcheggi") && CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?title)), "storico")
  )
  OPTIONAL { ?dataset dct:issued ?issued }

PREFIX dct: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/>
PREFIX foaf: <http://xmlns.com/foaf/0.1/>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>

SELECT (YEAR(?created) AS ?anno) (MONTH(?created) AS ?mese) (COUNT(?dataset) AS ?totale)
WHERE {
  ?dataset a dcat:Dataset ;
           dct:publisher ?publisher ;
           dct:issued ?created .
  ?publisher foaf:name ?nome .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?nome)), "palermo"))
  FILTER(?created >= "2025-01-01"^^xsd:date)
}
GROUP BY (YEAR(?created)) (MONTH(?created))
ORDER BY ?anno ?mese

original_query:
PREFIX dcat: <http://www.w3.org/ns/dcat#>
PREFIX dct: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>

SELECT ?dataset ?title ?publisher
WHERE {
  ?dataset a dcat:Dataset ;
           dct:title ?title ;
           dct:publisher ?pub .
  ?pub rdfs:label ?publisher .
  FILTER(
    CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?title)), "mafia") ||
    CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?title)), "organised crime") ||
    CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?title)), "organized crime") ||
    CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?title)), "criminalit") ||
    CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?title)), "antimafia")
  )
  FILTER(LANG(?title) IN ("en", "it", ""))
}
LIMIT 20

original_query:
PREFIX dcatap: <http://data.europa.eu/r5r/>
PREFIX dct: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/>
PREFIX dcat: <http://www.w3.org/ns/dcat#>
PREFIX foaf: <http://xmlns.com/foaf/0.1/>

SELECT DISTINCT ?catalog ?title WHERE {
  ?dataset a dcat:Dataset .
  ?dataset dcatap:applicableLegislation ?leg .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(STR(?leg), "HVD"))
  ?catalog dcat:dataset ?dataset .
  OPTIONAL { ?catalog dct:title ?title . FILTER(LANG(?title) = "it" || LANG(?title) = "en") }
}
LIMIT 50

nl_query: Could you provide the status of http://geodata.gov.gr?
I'm looking for Italian municipal publishers. Can you tell me which ones have the most datasets that are either part of a collection or related to regulation 2023/138?
original_query:
PREFIX dcat: <http://www.w3.org/ns/dcat#>
PREFIX dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/>
PREFIX foaf: <http://xmlns.com/foaf/0.1/>
PREFIX eli: <http://data.europa.eu/eli/ontology#>

SELECT ?publisherName (COUNT(DISTINCT ?dataset) AS ?hvd_count)
WHERE {
  ?dataset a dcat:Dataset .
  ?dataset dcterms:publisher ?publisher .
  ?publisher foaf:name ?publisherName .
  {
    ?dataset dcterms:isPartOf ?collection .
    ?collection dcat:isDistributionOf ?something .
  } UNION {
    ?dataset <http://data.europa.eu/r5r/applicableLegislation> ?leg .
    FILTER(CONTAINS(STR(?leg), "2023/138"))
  }
  FILTER(lang(?publisherName) = "it" || lang(?publisherName) = "")
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?publisherName)), "comune"))
}
GROUP BY ?publisherName
ORDER BY DESC(?hvd_count)

PREFIX dcat: <http://www.w3.org/ns/dcat#>
PREFIX dct: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/>
PREFIX foaf: <http://xmlns.com/foaf/0.1/>

SELECT DISTINCT ?title ?endpointURL
WHERE {
  ?service a dcat:DataService .
  ?service dct:title ?title .
  ?service dcat:endpointURL ?endpointURL .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(STR(?endpointURL), "/api") || CONTAINS(STR(?endpointURL), "/rest") || CONTAINS(STR(?endpointURL), "/v1") || CONTAINS(STR(?endpointURL), "/v2") || CONTAINS(STR(?endpointURL), "/v3"))
  FILTER(!CONTAINS(STR(?endpointURL), "ldpgis.it"))
  FILTER(!CONTAINS(STR(?endpointURL), "/wms") && !CONTAINS(STR(?endpointURL), "/wfs"))
}
ORDER BY ?title
LIMIT 50

nl_query: What are the most frequent HVD categories among datasets from dati-gov-it and RNDT that fall under regulation 2023/138/oj?
original_query:
PREFIX dcatap: <http://data.europa.eu/r5r/>
PREFIX dcat: <http://www.w3.org/ns/dcat#>
PREFIX dct: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/>
PREFIX skos: <http://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/core#>

SELECT ?categoryLabel (COUNT(DISTINCT ?dataset) AS ?count)
WHERE {
  VALUES ?catalogue {
    <http://data.europa.eu/88u/catalogue/dati-gov-it>
    <http://data.europa.eu/88u/catalogue/rndt>
  }
  ?catalogue dcat:dataset ?dataset .
  ?dataset dcatap:applicableLegislation <http://data.europa.eu/eli/reg_impl/2023/138/oj> ;
           dcatap:hvdCategory ?category .
  ?category skos:prefLabel ?categoryLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?categoryLabel) = "en")
}
GROUP BY ?categoryLabel
ORDER BY DESC(?count)

PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>

SELECT (YEAR(?issued) AS ?anno) (MONTH(?issued) AS ?mese) (COUNT(?dataset) AS ?totale)

original_query:
PREFIX dcat: <http://www.w3.org/ns/dcat#>
PREFIX dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/>

SELECT ?s ?title
WHERE {
  ?s dcat:record ?r .
  <http://data.europa.eu/88u/catalogue/data-gov-gr> dcat:record ?r .
  ?r foaf:primaryTopic ?s .
  ?s dcterms:title ?title .
  FILTER(LANG(?title) = "en" || LANG(?title) = "")
}
LIMIT 10
